attributes.description: Alerts when `envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_warming > 0`. Listeners stuck in the warming state cannot accept traffic.
attributes.name: [Envoy OTel] Listeners warming

investigation_guide.blob:
## Envoy listeners warming

### What fired
`envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_warming` remained above 0 during the window.

### Why it matters
Listeners warm when Envoy is waiting for secrets or initial discovery responses. Listeners stuck warming are effectively unreachable.

### Triage
1. Check the admin `/config_dump` or `/listeners` to see which listener is stuck.
2. Inspect xDS / SDS connectivity to the control plane.
3. Look for secrets (TLS certs) that have not been delivered.

### Remediation
- Fix the upstream discovery or secret source.
- Restart the pod as last resort.

### Tuning
- Warming should be milliseconds. Any sustained value warrants investigation.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_warming IS NOT NULL
// Listeners warming should drop to 0 after config load
| STATS max_warming = MAX(envoy.listener_manager.total_listeners_warming)
| WHERE max_warming > 0
